case_title: DAWOUD, AMGAD Z IND DBA VALENTINO MARKET VS KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAWOUD, AMGAD Z IND DBA VALENTINO MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,213.03 FILED BY KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAWOUD, AMGAD Z IND DBA VALENTINO MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL TO GUS KOUSSA MARKETS FIRST REFRIG. RETURNED SIGNED;
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAWOUD, AMGAD Z IND DBA VALENTINO MARKET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KOUSSA, GUS M.INDBA MARKETS FIRST REFRIGERATION CO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DAWOUD, AMGAD Z IND DBA VALENTINO MARKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
